Package index

Scaling calibrators

cal_platt()
Platt scaling
cal_temperature()
Temperature scaling
cal_beta()
Beta calibration

Binning calibrators

cal_isotonic()
Isotonic calibration
cal_histogram()
Histogram binning calibration

Multiclass calibrators

cal_vector_scaling()
Vector scaling
cal_dirichlet()
Dirichlet calibration
cal_ovr()
One-vs-rest multiclass calibration

Metrics

ece()
Expected Calibration Error
mce()
Maximum Calibration Error
ace()
Average Calibration Error
mmce()
Maximum Mean Calibration Error

Diagnostics

reliability_diagram()
Reliability diagram

Cross-validation

cal_cv()
Cross-validated calibration

Transformations

logit()
Logit transformation
inv_logit()
Inverse logit transformation
